translation_text: It is better to leave a vessel unfilled, than to attempt to carry it when it is full.
If you keep feeling a point that has been sharpened, the point cannot long preserve its sharpness.

chinese_text: 金玉滿堂，莫之能守；富貴而驕，
translation_text: When gold and jade fill the hall, their possessor cannot keep them safe. When wealth and honours lead to arrogancy, this brings its evil on itself.

chinese_text: 自遺其咎。功遂身退，天之道。
translation_text: When the work is done, and one's name is becoming distinguished, to withdraw into obscurity is the way of Heaven.
